title: A Quiet Shrine
description: A weathered shrine sits at a crossroads, half-swallowed by moss.

title: A Desperate Traveler
description: A stranger, gaunt and shaking, begs for help.

choices.label: Share your rations (lose 5 HP)
choices.resultText: It costs you, but they'll live.

title: An Overgrown Library
description: Shelves of rotted books, one still legible.

choices.label: Study the technique (gain a random card)
choices.resultText: You add a new trick to your deck.

choices.label: Leave it be
choices.resultText: Some knowledge isn't worth the risk.

title: A Sealed Reliquary
description: A stone case, sealed shut, hums faintly.

choices.label: Pay the toll to pass safely (lose 15 gold)

title: A Grasping Shade
description: A translucent hand reaches from the dark, feeling for your belongings.

choices.label: Let it take what it wants (lose a relic)
Bribe it with gold instead (lose 20 gold)
